narrative:
Clinton County has 27,045 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.6% of registrants.
